LanguageData.AtmosphericHeater.description: Build compact Poseidon home reactors that burn bioferrite and drive enormous amounts of heat into the surrounding air.
LanguageData.AtmosphericHeater.label: Poseidon home reactor
LanguageData.BioferriteGenerator.description: Build power generators that burn bioferrite as a fuel. Bioferrite keeps its own identity here, but the hardware around it can still read like a desperate late-era Poseidon project.
